justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially misinterpreted the user's date reference, assuming the year 2027 instead of the current year, which required a clarification from the user.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent did not proactively offer alternative dates or times when the initial requests were unavailable, instead asking the user to provide new preferences.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made two separate check_availability calls for the initial two dates provided by the user, which could have been combined into a single call.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was somewhat hampered by the agent's initial misunderstanding of the date, leading to an extra turn for clarification.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered by correctly processing the user's clarified date and time, but it required the user to explicitly provide new information rather than the agent suggesting alternatives.
